<includeonly>Field {{#if:{{{type|}}}|{{{type}}}|observation}}{{#if:{{{observer|}}}|, {{{observer}}}}}{{#if:{{{date|}}}| ({{{date}}})}}{{#if:{{{note|}}}| — {{{note}}}}}</includeonly><noinclude>
== Usage ==
<code><nowiki>{{Cite field|date=2026-03-15|observer=J. Smith|type=inspection|note=Rebar placement verified prior to pour, Clarifier 1}}</nowiki></code>

Renders as: Field inspection, J. Smith (2026-03-15) — Rebar placement verified prior to pour, Clarifier 1

=== Parameters ===
* '''date''' (required): Date of observation
* '''observer''' (optional): Who recorded it
* '''type''' (optional): inspection, daily report, photo log, test result (defaults to "observation")
* '''note''' (optional): What was observed

[[Category:Citation templates]]
</noinclude>
